title: AI That’s Too Dangerous For You? What we learned from S.A.T.A.N
summary: IBM Technology discusses how AI is detecting zero-day vulnerabilities faster than before and reshaping cybersecurity defense strategies. The video explores AI-driven vulnerability scanning and DevSecOps as mechanisms to improve system safety.
writeup: IBM Technology examines how AI accelerates the detection of zero-day vulnerabilities and reshapes cybersecurity defenses. The video frames AI as a tool for strengthening security rather than purely as a risk, covering AI-driven vulnerability scanning and DevSecOps as methods to improve system safety. The takeaway: faster detection of unknown flaws and security integrated into the development pipeline position AI on the defensive side.
